title: TheLunares Structures − Observatory
description: This mod adds a medium-sized observation structure to your world. This structure can only be found in "Forest" biomes, 1000-2000 blocks away from the spawn point.
body:
![Observatory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94cda79a8cb09c46bd58873208bf4310bf4f6b9a_0.webp)

‧ About Observatory
One day, a villager who was an Observer was conducting research on spells and wizardry in the observatory until the structure was raided by Illagers. Now this place is controlled by twin illusioner brothers.

‧ About Loot Table
It has a highly complex loot table that includes items from the Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks and Twilight Forest mods. You can also sell many library-related items here to the observer.

‧ About Exploration
The observatory can be found in "Forest" biomes. (minimum 1000 blocks away from the spawnpoint)
